title: ADULT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT - 211info
text: LIFEWORKS NW BEAVERTON ADULT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides outpatient and intensive outpatient services for adults dealing with alcohol and drug problems. Also provides a DUII Adult Addictions outpatient program for adults required to receive treatment as part of a DUII sentence. 10700 SW Beaverton-Hillside Highway Suite 110 Beaverton, OR 97005 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Varies by site Email (503) 641-1475 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 641-1475 Intake (503) 645-9010 Toll-free (888) 645-1666 Intake Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call FEES: We accept OHP, Medicaid or Medicare. If you need coverage, we can help you get enrolled. Some services are available on a sliding fee scale. We do not turn people away for lack of ability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: Varies by site TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus 48 on Cornell Road Services: Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment DUI Offender Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PROMOTORA MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - OUTPATIENT MENTAL HEALTH CARE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - PARENT-CHILD INTERACTIVE THERAPY MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - SEVERE MENTAL ILLNESS SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - TRANSITION-AGE YOUTH SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - WOMEN'S RESIDENTIAL SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - YOUTH SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LIFEWORKS NW BEAVERTON
